test_patch:
diff --git a/config/config_test.go b/config/config_test.go
index 51ca97d9..494bdea8 100644
--- a/config/config_test.go
+++ b/config/config_test.go
@@ -4,6 +4,7 @@ import (
 	"io/ioutil"
 	"net/http"
 	"net/http/httptest"
+	"os"
 	"testing"
 	"time"
 
@@ -93,6 +94,11 @@ func TestLoad(t *testing.T) {
 					MigrationsPath: "./config/migrations",
 					URL:            "postgres://postgres@localhost:5432/flipt?sslmode=disable",
 				},
+				Meta: metaConfig{
+					CheckForUpdates:     false,
+					DataPath:            "/tmp/flipt/data",
+					UpdateCheckInterval: 30 * time.Minute,
+				},
 			},
 		},
 	}
@@ -240,3 +246,127 @@ func TestServeHTTP(t *testing.T) {
 	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, resp.StatusCode)
 	assert.NotEmpty(t, body)
 }
+
+func TestDefaultMetaConfig(t *testing.T) {
+	cfg := Default()
+	assert.True(t, cfg.Meta.CheckForUpdates)
+	assert.Equal(t, "/var/opt/flipt/meta", cfg.Meta.DataPath)
+	assert.Equal(t, 6*time.Hour, cfg.Meta.UpdateCheckInterval)
+}
+
+func TestLoadMetaFallback(t *testing.T) {
+	dir := t.TempDir()
+	path := dir + "/config.yml"
+	content := `meta:
+  check_for_updates: true
+  data_path: ""
+  update_check_interval: 0s
+`
+	err := os.WriteFile(path, []byte(content), 0644)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+
+	cfg, err := Load(path)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+
+	assert.Equal(t, "/var/opt/flipt/meta", cfg.Meta.DataPath)
+	assert.Equal(t, 6*time.Hour, cfg.Meta.UpdateCheckInterval)
+	assert.True(t, cfg.Meta.CheckForUpdates)
+}
+
+func TestValidateMeta(t *testing.T) {
+	tests := []struct {
+		name    string
+		cfg     *Config
+		wantErr bool
+	}{
+		{
+			name: "relative data path rejected",
+			cfg: &Config{
+				Meta: metaConfig{
+					DataPath: "relative/path",
+				},
+			},
+			wantErr: true,
+		},
+		{
+			name: "absolute data path accepted",
+			cfg: &Config{
+				Meta: metaConfig{
+					DataPath: "/var/data/flipt",
+				},
+			},
+			wantErr: false,
+		},
+		{
+			name: "non-existent absolute path accepted",
+			cfg: &Config{
+				Meta: metaConfig{
+					DataPath: "/nonexistent/flipt/data/path",
+				},
+			},
+			wantErr: false,
+		},
+		{
+			name: "negative interval with updates enabled",
+			cfg: &Config{
+				Meta: metaConfig{
+					CheckForUpdates:     true,
+					DataPath:            "/var/opt/flipt/meta",
+					UpdateCheckInterval: -1 * time.Hour,
+				},
+			},
+			wantErr: true,
+		},
+		{
+			name: "positive interval with updates enabled",
+			cfg: &Config{
+				Meta: metaConfig{
+					CheckForUpdates:     true,
+					DataPath:            "/var/opt/flipt/meta",
+					UpdateCheckInterval: 6 * time.Hour,
+				},
+			},
+			wantErr: false,
+		},
+		{
+			name: "zero interval with updates disabled",
+			cfg: &Config{
+				Meta: metaConfig{
+					CheckForUpdates:     false,
+					DataPath:            "/var/opt/flipt/meta",
+					UpdateCheckInterval: 0,
+				},
+			},
+			wantErr: false,
+		},
+		{
+			name: "negative interval with updates disabled",
+			cfg: &Config{
+				Meta: metaConfig{
+					CheckForUpdates:     false,
+					DataPath:            "/var/opt/flipt/meta",
+					UpdateCheckInterval: -5 * time.Second,
+				},
+			},
+			wantErr: false,
+		},
+	}
+
+	for _, tt := range tests {
+		var (
+			cfg     = tt.cfg
+			wantErr = tt.wantErr
+		)
+
+		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
+			err := cfg.validate()
+
+			if wantErr {
+				require.Error(t, err)
+				return
+			}
+
+			require.NoError(t, err)
+		})
+	}
+}
